## 💭 Problem

Describe the search, filtering, data, or desktop workflow that could be improved.

## ✨ Proposed solution

Describe the behavior you would like and provide an example where useful.

## 🔀 Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative approaches or workarounds.

## 📦 Scope and data impact

Note whether this would change the renderer, Electron IPC contract, database importer/schema, packaged data, documentation, or distribution process.

## 📝 Additional context

Add mockups, example searches, FIFA editions, or related links.
